name: Spawn Global Entity
desc: Spawns a global entity visible to all players (lightning bolt).

implementation.overview: S2C spawns global entities (lightning bolts). Lightning detection modules use this for weather prediction and thunder tracking. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S2C.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S2CPacketSpawnGlobalEntity)
modules.purpose: Server sends S2CPacketSpawnGlobalEntity to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
